code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut product = 1
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
  if is_ws
    if in_num
      product = product * (sign * cur)
      in_num = false
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    end
  else
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
    end
    if b == 45
      sign = 0 - sign
    else if b == 43
      sign = sign
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  product = product * (sign * cur)
end

println("product=#{product}")
